◎简　　介  

　　Hearing his New York fiancée Elaine has dumped him for another, Joel gets depressed and fears he is too old to have another lover. The men try to cheer Joel up with male bonding and even Maggie as stand-in for closure. Hollis worries because his fiancée Shelly spends all her time and his money on the TV's shopping channel. Chris tries to talk some sense into her. Written by KGF...
